seo.title: Floor Coverings International Franchise Development
seo.description: Explore Floor Coverings International, the number one flooring franchise in North America with a scalable mobile showroom model.

hero.title: Join an elite flooring franchise built for scalable local ownership.
hero.body: Floor Coverings International is the number one flooring franchise in North America, bringing thousands of flooring options directly to customers through a branded Mobile Flooring Showroom.
hero.formBody: Tell us who you are and where you are interested in growing. A franchise representative will follow up.
hero.formNote: Straightforward information. No high-pressure sales tactics.

why.eyebrow: A Better Way to Buy Flooring
why.title: FCI replaced the showroom visit with a customer-first experience.
why.body: Homeowners no longer need to drive to a big-box retailer, sort through endless displays, carry samples home, and return to place an order. FCI franchisees bring the options, advice, and installation coordination to the customer.
why.ctaNote: Get the next step from a franchise representative.

features.title: Disruptive Model
features.body: Mobile Flooring Showrooms make the buying process more convenient, more personal, and better aligned with how consumers make decisions today.

features.title: Trusted Local Owners
features.body: Local franchise owners and their teams manage the process from consultation through installation, with clear communication at every step.

features.title: Growth Category
features.body: Flooring is one of the most valuable updates homeowners make, and FCI is positioned in a large, fragmented industry with room to grow.

details.title: Clear answers on market, investment, and support.
details.ctaNote: Ask about territory availability, qualification, and next steps.
details.disclaimer: Investment and revenue figures are drawn from current Floor Coverings International franchise materials and should be reviewed in the Franchise Disclosure Document. Individual results vary.

panels.title: Territory Info
panels.body: FCI has more than 250 locations across the United States and Canada and continues to expand in qualified markets. The model is built for local ownership, large protected territories, and a professional in-home customer experience.
bullets: Mobile showroom model allows owners to serve customers without a traditional retail storefront.
Franchisees specialize in custom residential flooring and local project management.
Growth conversations begin with market interest, candidate fit, and next-step timing.

panels.title: Investment
panels.body: The opportunity is designed for candidates who want to build a professionally staffed local business, not simply operate as a contractor. The first step is a confidential qualification conversation with the franchise development team.
bullets: Total investment costs are listed at $154,400 to $341,000 in current franchise materials.
Average gross revenue for booked jobs across the system was reported at $1,180,809 in 2022.
The model centers on consultation, product selection, proposal, and installation coordination.

panels.title: Support
panels.body: FCI owners are supported by a brand focused on trust, communication, and service. Franchisees consult customers on design, coordinate installation resources, and own the experience from start to finish.
bullets: Mobile showrooms are stocked with carpet, hardwood, laminate, luxury vinyl, natural stone, tile, and more.
Products are kept current with design trends and tested by third parties.
Local teams provide honest advice without high-pressure sales tactics.

model.title: A service experience built around the customer's home.
model.body: FCI franchisees bring flooring samples into the room where the decision will be made. Customers can see color, texture, and material in their own light, with guidance from a knowledgeable local team.
bullets: Hardwood, carpet, luxury vinyl, laminate, natural stone, tile, specialty flooring, and more.
Consultation, product selection, proposal, installation coordination, and final walk-through.
A professional model built on convenience, honest advice, and customer satisfaction.
model.ctaNote: Learn what ownership can look like in your market.

growth.title: Built for owners who want a professional local business.
growth.body: FCI has grown from a mobile flooring concept into one of the largest flooring franchise systems in the United States and Canada by focusing on service, local accountability, and a better customer experience.
growth.ctaNote: Connect with the franchise development team.

leadership.title: Experienced leadership behind the franchise system.
leadership.body: FCI's leadership team brings decades of franchise, operations, marketing, technology, and development experience to support owners as they build professional local businesses.
leadership.ctaNote: Speak with the franchise development team about candidate fit.

people.name: Tom Wood
people.bio: Leads FCI with deep FirstService Brands experience across franchise strategy, operations, and brand expansion.

people.name: Chad Schloerke
people.bio: Helped scale FCI from an early mobile concept into a professionally staffed operating model built for growth.

people.name: Stacey Vogler
people.bio: Guides brand experience and marketing strategy with a focus on profitable growth for the franchise system.

people.name: Albert Hermans
people.bio: Leads franchise development with hands-on operations experience and a practical view of franchisee success.

contact.title: Interested in owning a Mobile Showroom franchise?
contact.body: If Floor Coverings International sounds like the right franchise opportunity, start here. Share a few details and a franchise representative will be in touch.
contact.note: Direct, respectful communication from the first conversation.
contact.formNote: By submitting, you agree to be contacted about franchise opportunities.

footer.legal: For qualified candidates only. Offering by FDD where required.
